name: Sacramento Beef Pot
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Red wine or beef broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all excess fat from the meat. Brown the beef in its own fat in a large skillet; remove and set aside. Drain all but 2 tablespoons of fat from the skillet.
2. Saute the onion until soft in the remaining fat.
3. Place the meat, sauteed onion, potatoes, zucchini, red pepper rings, wine or broth, salt, pepper, and bay leaf into a slow cooker; cover.
4. Cook on low for 10 hours or on high for 5 hours, or until the meat is tender when pierced with a fork. Place the meat and vegetables on a heated platter and keep warm.
5. Turn off the heat control. Combine flour and water in a cup; pour into the liquid in the slow cooker; cover. Cook for 15 minutes. Pass the sauce separately in a heated gravy boat.
